interventions.name: N4 Intervention 1
interventions.summary: layered architecture diagrams that require each bounded component or service to be named and related

interventions.name: N4 Intervention 2
interventions.summary: resource-budget tasks comparing how one design changes under tighter time, memory, or bandwidth limits

interventions.name: N4 Intervention 3
interventions.summary: application-versus-platform scenario sorts with explicit responsibility explanations

interventions.name: N4 Intervention 4
interventions.summary: paired architecture analyses transferring the same layer-and-resource reasoning to a second system example
